title: fumaria agraria var. platycarpa
intro: Fumaria agraria var. platycarpa, also known as the broad-fruited fumitory, is a type of flowering plant in the fumitory family (Fumariaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Fumaria agraria var. platycarpa is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
